note: Sources checked daily by the promo watcher. Edit freely — add/remove firms, fix affiliate URLs. codeWorks true = code DTJ may be mentioned for that firm.
rules: Only publish a promo when a source page clearly shows an active sale/discount (percentage off, promo code, limited-time offer).
Prefer the biggest/most relevant single promo of the day — one banner, not a rotation.
Always include the affiliate code DTJ in the message when the firm supports it.
The banner id must be unique per promotion (e.g. apex-90off-2026-07-05) so users who dismissed the last promo see the new one.
Banner url must ALWAYS be the firm's affiliateUrl — that's how clicks are attributed to Tyler.
If no active promo is found anywhere, leave announce.json unchanged.
Never invent a promo. If unsure whether it's active, skip it.

sources.name: Bulenox
sources.codeNote: Bulenox honors both DTJ and DTJ7
